site_description.en: Preprints from configured arXiv and EarthArXiv topics, summarized with bilingual notes and keyword trends.
site_description.zh: 追踪自定义 arXiv 与 EarthArXiv 主题预印本历史记录，包含双语摘要与关键词趋势。

query: ((cat:physics.geo-ph) OR (all:geophysics) OR (all:seismology) OR (all:geodesy) OR (all:geodynamics) OR (all:geomagnetism)) AND (submittedDate:[202605230000 TO 202605302359])

paper.title: A benchmark deep learning dataset for the classification of supraglacial lake drainage mechanism across the central-west Greenland Ice Sheet
paper.abstract: Supraglacial lakes on the Greenland Ice Sheet drain through physically distinct pathways: hydrofracture, moulins, lateral stream routing, and crevasse-fields. Each drainage mechanism carries unique implications for ice sheet dynamics. Existing automated classifications reduce each lake's drainage behavior to a time-series of scalar values representing the observed water surface-area and classify each lake based on drainage rate (e.g., rapid vs. slow). This scalar reduction conflates physically different drainage mechanisms, which can only be determined through consideration of full spatio-temporal tracking. Here we introduce a human-benchmarked, machine learning-ready benchmark dataset that pairs full Sentinel-2 multispectral satellite imagery time series with human-expert-labels assigned for N=1679 supraglacial lakes in the central-west basin of the Greenland Ice Sheet during the 2018 (n=679) and 2019 (n=1000) melt seasons. The dataset is formatted as per-lake CF-1.8 NetCDF files each containing: six Sentinel-2 reflectance bands at 10 meter spatial resolution and daily cadence over the 153 day melt season (1 May to 30 September); a per-pixel binary cloud mask; co-registered lake water masks (both static and dynamic); and the human-assigned drainage classification labels. We accompany the dataset with a baseline deep learning classifier, demonstrating the utility of the dataset both in deep learning workflows and in extending lake drainage classification from rate-based to mechanism-based. The dataset is released through the Stanford Digital Repository under a CC BY 4.0 license, and the accompanying open-source sat-tile-stack preprocessing software under an MIT license.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The preprint releases a human-benchmarked Sentinel-2 spatiotemporal dataset for classifying supraglacial lake drainage mechanisms in central-west Greenland, along with a baseline deep learning classifier to move beyond rate-only labels.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该预印本发布面向中西格陵兰的融雪湖排水机制的Sentinel-2时空基准数据集，并提供基线深度学习分类以超越仅凭排水速率的判别。
summary_en: problem: Existing automatic lake-drainage classification collapses spatiotemporal physics into scalar water-area time series, conflating distinct mechanisms.
approach: Build a human-benchmarked, ML-ready benchmark dataset by pairing Sentinel-2 multispectral daily image stacks with expert mechanism labels for 1,679 lakes across 2018–2019.

key result: A publicly released per-lake CF-1.8 NetCDF dataset (with cloud masks and dynamic/static lake masks) enables mechanism-based classification, demonstrated via a baseline deep learning classifier.
summary_zh: problem: 现有自动分类通常把融雪湖行为压缩为单一水面面积的时间序列，导致不同排水机制被混淆。
approach: 将2018–2019年中西格陵兰1,679个湖泊的Sentinel-2多光谱日尺度影像序列与专家标注的机制类别配对，构建人类基准的机器学习数据集。
key result: 该预先以每个湖为单位的CF-1.8 NetCDF形式发布（含云掩膜与静态/动态湖泊水面掩膜），并通过基线深度学习分类证明可进行机制级识别。
analysis.contribution_en: A new publicly available benchmark dataset and labeling scheme that retain full spatiotemporal satellite context to classify supraglacial lake drainage mechanisms (no drainage, hydrofracture, moulin drainage, lateral drainage, crevasse drainage) rather than relying on water-area rate proxies.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出并发布一个新的公开基准数据集与标注方案，保留融雪湖排水所需的完整卫星时空上下文，用于区分排水机制（无排水、液压破裂、冰斗/竖井型排水、侧向排水、裂隙场排水），而非仅依赖水面面积速率。
analysis.method_en: For each supraglacial lake, the workflow retrieves Sentinel-2 L2A reflectance bands at daily cadence over the melt season, preprocesses them into co-registered per-lake NetCDF CF-1.8 files with cloud masking and static/dynamic lake water masks, then applies human-UI-based expert interpretation to assign mechanism labels; a baseline deep learning classifier uses the resulting spatiotemporal image sequences to predict mechanisms.
analysis.method_zh: 对每个融雪湖，获取其融雪季内以日为间隔的Sentinel-2 L2A多光谱反射率并进行配准预处理，生成包含云掩膜以及静态/动态湖泊水面掩膜的每湖CF-1.8 NetCDF数据；随后借助图形界面的人为标注解释给出排水机制标签，并用基线深度学习模型对这些时空影像序列进行机制预测。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Central-west Greenland Ice Sheet (CW drainage basin) with 1,679 supraglacial lakes labeled using Sentinel-2 image time series from melt seasons 2018 (679 lakes) and 2019 (1,000 lakes).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 研究区为中西格陵兰冰盖CW汇流盆地；对1,679个融雪湖进行标注，使用2018年（679个湖）与2019年（1,000个湖）的Sentinel-2融雪季影像时间序列。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This matters because mechanism-specific identification (e.g., hydrofracture vs. lateral drainage) is directly tied to ice–bed coupling and meltwater routing, but the work’s tracked contribution is primarily a dataset enabling such mechanism studies.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 这很重要，因为机制级识别（如液压破裂与侧向排水）与冰-床耦合及融水输送路径直接相关；但该预印本的主要贡献是提供数据集以支撑后续机制研究。

paper.title: Resolving the SAI Trilemma with a Novel Core–Shell Mineral Aerosol: DoloSil-20, a Silica-Passivated Dolomite Architecture for Simultaneous Optical Efficiency, Thermal Neutrality, and Ozone Safety
paper.abstract: Conventional stratospheric aerosol injection (SAI) strategies based on liquid sulfate aerosols (H2SO4.H2O) introduce well-documented risks of catalytic ozone destruction and stratospheric near-infrared heating. From a materials-science perspective, the core challenge is one of multi-objective material selection: identifying a particle composition that simultaneously optimizes optical performance, chemical inertness, and thermal neutrality in the stratospheric environment. We formalize these competing requirements as the SAI Trilemma: (1) radiative efficiency, maximizing shortwave backscattering per unit injected mass; (2) thermal neutrality, suppressing stratospheric heating; and (3) ozone safety, mitigating heterogeneous ozone chemistry. To screen candidates across this Trilemma, we propose and evaluate a novel materials-engineering solution: a novel core-shell mineral aerosol (DoloSil-20)—a dolomite (CaMg(CO3)2) core encapsulated by a 20 nm amorphous silica shell, synthesized via Stober-type wet chemistry and designed as a core-shell heterostructure that combines high refractive index contrast with chemical passivation. This architecture is evaluated against pristine calcite and a liquid sulfate reference using a 1D vertical sectional aerosol model integrated over a 1825-day (~5-year) horizon. At lambda = 550 nm and D = 500 nm outer diameter, the mass-specific backscatter proxy beta_back of the DoloSil-20 reaches 0.3405 m2 g-1—a +45.17% advantage over the sulfate reference (0.2346 m2 g-1)—computed via the Aden-Kerker analytical solution for concentric spheres [Aden & Kerker, 1951; Bohren & Huffman, 1983]. This constitutes a wavelength-specific screening result at lambda = 550 nm; spectrally integrated radiative forcing requires a full broadband radiative transfer calculation not performed here. Both mineral proxies exhibit negligible imaginary refractive indices (k ~ 0 at 1500 nm), yielding temperature-anomaly proxy values at the numerical floating-point noise floor (< 10^-15 K). This result is mechanistically expected from the prescribed optical properties and functions as a model consistency check rather than an independent physical prediction. Using a first-order partial-column (10-40 km) ozone surrogate—not equivalent to three-dimensional photochemical model output, and initialized above typical observed partial columns—the silica-passivated core-shell constrains peak ozone depletion to 10.03% of the model domain column, compared to sulfate's 47.11% and calcite's 14.77%. The principal trade-off is atmospheric persistence: higher particle density yields a day-1825 mass retention of 53.98% versus sulfate's 69.46%, a direct consequence of gravitational sedimentation scaling with particle density. Within the constraints of this reduced-order 1D screening framework, the DoloSil-20 architecture simultaneously addresses all three axes of the SAI Trilemma. These results motivate evaluation in three-dimensional chemistry-climate models, which constitute the necessary next step before deployment-relevant conclusions can be drawn.
categories: Oceanography and Atmospheric Sciences and Meteorology

analysis.one_sentence_en: A silica-passivated dolomite core–shell aerosol (DoloSil-20) is proposed and screened in a 1D five-year stratospheric model to improve shortwave backscatter, avoid heating, and reduce ozone depletion versus sulfate.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 提出并用1D五年分层模拟筛选DoloSil-20（二氧化硅包覆白云石核），在提高短波后向散射的同时避免近红外加热并降低臭氧耗损。
summary_en: Problem: Conventional stratospheric aerosol injection materials like liquid sulfate fail to simultaneously achieve high radiative backscatter, thermal neutrality, and ozone safety (the SAI Trilemma).

Approach: Design a dolomite–silica core–shell mineral aerosol (20 nm amorphous silica shell) and evaluate optical properties via coated-sphere scattering theory, then simulate coupled transport/microphysics and an ozone surrogate in a 10–40 km, 1825-day 1D sectional model.

Key result: At 550 nm with 500 nm outer diameter, DoloSil-20 shows a +45.17% higher mass-specific backscatter proxy than liquid sulfate, near-zero temperature anomaly, and peak ozone depletion reduced to 10.03% versus 47.11% for sulfate, but with lower 1825-day mass retention (53.98% vs 69.46%).
summary_zh: 问题：传统SAI材料（如硫酸盐液滴）难以同时满足高短波后向散射、热中性与臭氧安全（SAI三难题）。
方法：提出白云石–二氧化硅核壳矿物气溶胶（20 nm非晶二氧化硅壳），用同轴核壳散射理论评估光学性质，并在10–40 km、1825天的1D分段气溶胶模型中耦合输运/微物理与臭氧替代指标进行筛选。
关键结果：在550 nm、外径500 nm条件下，DoloSil-20的质量后向散射代理比硫酸盐提高+45.17%，温度异常近零，臭氧峰值耗损为10.03%（硫酸盐47.11%），但1825天质量滞留较低（53.98% vs 69.46%）。
analysis.contribution_en: Introduces the DoloSil-20 silica-passivated dolomite core–shell aerosol as a multi-objective candidate and provides an integrated 1825-day 1D reduced-order screening that tracks optical backscatter, near-IR heating proxy, ozone depletion surrogate, and persistence trade-offs under a unified “SAI Trilemma” framework.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出DoloSil-20（二氧化硅钝化的白云石核壳气溶胶）作为多目标候选材料，并在统一“SAI三难题”框架下给出1825天1D降阶筛选：同时评估短波后向散射、近红外增温代理、臭氧耗损替代指标以及持续性权衡。
analysis.method_en: Core–shell optical screening using coated-sphere scattering (Aden–Kerker for concentric spheres) with Lorenz–Mie for reference minerals; then a coupled 1D vertical sectional aerosol model (10–40 km, 1825 days) including advection/upwelling, eddy diffusion, coagulation, sedimentation, sulfate condensation, NIR radiative heating proxy, and a first-order partial-column (10–40 km) ozone surrogate; numerics via an adaptive RK45 solver and mass-retention from gravitational settling.
analysis.method_zh: 用同轴核壳散射理论进行核壳光学筛选（Aden–Kerker用于同心两层球；参考矿物使用Lorenz–Mie），随后用耦合的1D垂直分段气溶胶模型（10–40 km、1825天）评估输运与微物理（上升/对流、湍流扩散、凝并、沉降、硫酸盐凝结）并计算近红外加热代理，同时用一阶部分柱（10–40 km）臭氧替代指标；数值积分采用自适应RK45，并通过重力沉降推断质量滞留。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Not specified (computational study); simulated atmospheric column 10–40 km altitude over a 1825-day (~5-year) horizon in a 1D vertical sectional model, using a simplified ozone partial-column surrogate.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 未说明（计算研究）；在1D垂直分层模型中模拟10–40 km高度范围，并覆盖1825天（约5年）时间尺度，臭氧使用一阶部分柱替代指标。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Directly relevant to solar geoengineering stratospheric aerosols by proposing a material-level way to mitigate both ozone chemistry risk and near-IR heating while maintaining high scattering, though conclusions remain limited to a reduced-order 1D screening with simplified ozone chemistry.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与太阳辐射地球工程中平流层气溶胶材料高度相关：从材料层面同时缓解臭氧异相化学风险与近红外加热，并保持较高散射效率；但由于研究停留在简化臭氧化学的1D降阶筛选，仍需更高维度验证。

paper.title: Development and Evaluation of the High-Resolution MUSICA UK Domain: A Case Study of Global and Regional Biomass Burning Impacts
paper.abstract: Regional air quality models provide insights into local pollution and exposure, but limitations in representing large-scale atmospheric processes and long-range transport can introduce inconsistencies across spatial scales, which can be addressed using multi-scale chemical transport models. We develop the first UK-specific regionally refined grid (UKne30×16; ∼7 km), alongside a global uniform grid (ne60; ∼56 km), within the Multi-Scale Infrastructure for Chemistry and Aerosols version 0 (MUSICAv0), and evaluated against in situ observations and reanalysis data. MUSICAv0 reproduces the spatial patterns of annual mean surface O3 (R = 0.87; NMB = 12.80%) and PM2.5 (R = 0.64; NMB =-15.70%) across the UK. Compared with ne60, the UK refined configuration better represents transboundary pollution transport, resolves fine-scale horizontal dispersion and vertical mixing, and more accurately captures the spatial variability during pollution episodes. Using biomass burning (BB) as case studies, we show that long-range BB transport elevates springtime PM2.5 by 15–25% and O3 by 5–8%, while summer enhancements of ∼10–14% are associated with local BB emissions, highlighting the importance of non domestic emissions for UK air quality. Further analysis of the 2018 Saddleworth Moor wildfire shows MUSICAv0’s ability to resolve plume transport and vertical structure, with wildfire smoke extending to ∼5.5 km altitude and significantly degrading air quality.
categories: Oceanography and Atmospheric Sciences and Meteorology

analysis.one_sentence_en: The study builds and evaluates a first UK regionally refined multi-scale chemistry model grid (UKne30×16, ~7 km) against observations, showing improved representation of transboundary pollution and biomass-burning impacts on UK PM2.5 and O3.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该研究构建并评估面向英国的区域加密多尺度化学传输模型网格（UKne30×16，约7 km），结果表明其能更好刻画跨境污染与生物质燃烧对英国PM2.5和臭氧的影响。
summary_en: problem: Regional air-quality modeling can produce cross-scale inconsistencies in large-scale transport representation, limiting reliable predictions for UK pollution episodes and non-local sources.
approach: Develop the UK-specific refined grid within MUSICAv0 and compare it with a coarser global uniform grid using in situ observations and reanalysis, with biomass-burning wildfire case studies.

key result: MUSICAv0 reproduces UK mean surface O3 and PM2.5 spatial patterns and shows biomass-burning transport increases spring PM2.5 by 15–25% and O3 by 5–8%, while UK summer enhancements (~10–14%) link to local BB emissions and wildfire smoke reaches ~5.5 km altitude.
summary_zh: problem：区域空气质量模型在大尺度输送表征上易出现跨尺度不一致，降低对英国污染过程及非本地产生源的预测可信度。
approach：在MUSICAv0中开发英国专用区域加密网格，并与较粗的全球均匀网格对比，利用实测站点与再分析数据评估，同时开展生物质燃烧与野火个例分析。
key result：MUSICAv0能重现英国地表年均O3与PM2.5的空间分布；生物质燃烧长距离输送使春季PM2.5升高15–25%、O3升高5–8%，而夏季约10–14%的增强与本地生物质燃烧排放相关，2018年Saddleworth Moor野火烟羽可上升至约5.5 km并显著劣化空气质量。
analysis.contribution_en: A first UK-specific regionally refined, multi-scale chemistry and aerosols configuration (7 km scale) within MUSICAv0, benchmarked against observations/reanalysis and demonstrated for biomass-burning and wildfire plume transport and vertical structure over the UK.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出并基于观测与再分析对标评估首个面向英国的区域加密多尺度化学与气溶胶配置（约7 km），并展示其对英国生物质燃烧/野火烟羽输送及垂直结构的刻画能力。
analysis.method_en: Use MUSICAv0 with two nested resolutions: a UK refined grid (~7 km; UKne30×16) and a global uniform grid (~56 km; ne60), evaluating against in situ observations and reanalysis; then run biomass burning case studies including a 2018 wildfire to assess plume height and episode-era spatial variability.
analysis.method_zh: 在MUSICAv0中设置两种分辨率：英国区域加密网格（~7 km；UKne30×16）与全球均匀网格（~56 km；ne60），并用站点实测与再分析数据进行评估；随后开展生物质燃烧个例（包括2018年野火）以分析烟羽高度及污染过程期的空间变化。
analysis.data_or_region_en: United Kingdom region (UKne30×16 and global ne60 within MUSICAv0), evaluated using in situ observations and reanalysis; case studies include long-range biomass-burning impacts and the 2018 Saddleworth Moor wildfire.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 英国区域（MUSICAv0中的UKne30×16与全球ne60），评估数据包括站点实测与再分析；个例包含长距离生物质燃烧影响以及2018年Saddleworth Moor野火。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is only tangential to geophysics/earth-observation topics; however, it is relevant to atmospheric composition and transport, including wildfire plume vertical structure, which can inform cross-disciplinary hazard and exposure studies.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与当前地球物理/遥感追踪主题关联较弱；但它对大气成分与输送（包括野火烟羽垂直结构）具有参考价值，可为跨学科的风险与暴露研究提供支撑。

paper.title: From Short Histories to Long Futures: Horizon-Aware Graph Neural Networks for Long Horizon Forecasting
paper.abstract: Accurate long-range prediction of geophysical systems is difficult due to strongly nonlinear dynamics, the high computational cost of full-physics simulations, and the error accumulation that arise when one-step autoregressive surrogates are rolled out over decades. Deep neural network can serve as efficient emulators, but most are trained only for next-step prediction and often drift or become unstable as the forecast horizon grows. We propose a multi-horizon graph neural network emulator that learns state-to-state transitions from a single current time to multiple future lead times within one unified model. The physical domain is represented as a graph, where nodes correspond to spatial locations with time-varying geophysical attributes and edges encode local spatial interactions. Given the current graph state, the model predicts the future evolution of key fields, ice thickness and ice velocities at all nodes, using a shared graph backbone with separate output branches for each target variable. To improve stability, the network predicts state increments relative to the current state, which are then added back to reconstruct future states. Training jointly optimizes all lead times with a unified regression objective, and inference uses a coarse-to-fine rollout that advances with larger jumps and selectively refines with shorter jumps to reduce drift and avoid redundant computation. Experiments on multi-decadal Pine Island Glacier simulations show that our approach achieves higher long-range accuracy and improved stability than both (i) an initial-state baseline that predicts each future time directly from the starting state and (ii) a standard single-step autoregressive rollout, producing a more reliable emulator for downstream climate and sea-level studies.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper proposes a horizon-conditioned graph neural network emulator that learns multi-lead state transitions from current ice-sheet conditions on an unstructured mesh, enabling more stable long-horizon forecasts than standard autoregressive rollout.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该论文提出一种地平线条件的图神经网络冰盖替代模型，在非结构网格上学习从当前状态到多预报期的状态转移，从而比常规自回归滚动更稳定地实现长时域预测。
summary_en: problem: Long-horizon ice-sheet emulation is hampered by nonlinear dynamics and error accumulation when one-step autoregressive surrogates are rolled out over decades.

approach: Train a single horizon-conditioned multi-horizon GNN on an unstructured ISSM mesh to predict state increments for ice thickness and velocities at multiple lead times, then use greedy descending-horizon rollout for inference.

key result: Experiments on multi-decadal Pine Island Glacier simulations show improved long-range accuracy and stability over both direct-initial-state baselines and standard single-step autoregressive rollouts.
summary_zh: problem: 长时域冰盖替代建模由于强非线性动力学以及将一步自回归代理长期滚动带来的误差累积而难以稳定预测。
approach: 在非结构ISS M网格上训练单一的地平线条件多地平线GNN，预测冰厚与速度的状态增量以覆盖多个预报期，并在推理时采用从大到小的贪婪地平线滚动。
key result: 在多十年Pine Island Glacier的ISSM模拟上，该方法相较“仅从初始状态直接预测”与“标准一步自回归滚动”都实现了更高的长程精度与更好的稳定性。
analysis.contribution_en: Introduces a horizon-aware, multi-horizon residual graph emulator with joint training over multiple lead times and a greedy descending-horizon rollout that reduces long-horizon drift in unstructured-mesh ice-sheet forecasting.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出一种具有地平线感知的多地平线残差图替代模型，并通过多预报期联合训练与从大到小的贪婪滚动策略来降低非结构网格冰盖预测中的长时域漂移。
analysis.method_en: A mesh-native GNN/GCN emulator represents the physical domain as a graph over ISSM mesh nodes with edge connectivity from the unstructured FEM mesh; it conditions on the forecast horizon, predicts residual increments for ice thickness and horizontal velocities at multiple lead times within one shared model, and performs coarse-to-fine/descending-horizon greedy rollout during inference.
analysis.method_zh: 将ISSM非结构有限元网格表示为图（节点为网格位置，边来自三角网格连通性）的网格原生GCN/GNN替代模型；模型显式输入预报地平线并预测冰厚与水平速度的残差增量，同时用一个共享参数网络覆盖多个预报期；推理时采用从大到小（粗到细）的贪婪滚动以降低误差累积。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Multi-decadal Pine Island Glacier (West Antarctica) simulations generated with ISSM on an unstructured finite-element mesh; exact dataset size and mesh details are not specified in the excerpt.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 西南极Pine Island Glacier（PIG）的多十年ISSM非结构有限元网格模拟；在摘录中未说明数据规模与网格细节。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Directly relevant to geophysical emulation of ice-sheet dynamics for climate and sea-level applications, by providing a more reliable long-horizon surrogate for costly physics-based simulations.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与冰盖动力学的地球物理替代建模高度相关，可为气候与海平面研究提供更可靠的长时域代理模型，降低对昂贵物理仿真的依赖。

paper.title: Restoring Velocity Immunity via Dynamic Mirror Compensation in a Large-Area Dual-Atom-Interferometer Gyroscope
paper.abstract: We propose and demonstrate a dynamical mirror compensation scheme to restore velocity immunity in a large-area dual-atom-interferometer gyroscope. In an ideal Mach-Zehnder configuration, the phase shift is inherently immune to atomic velocity, but this property is broken by the Earth's rotation via the Coriolis effect. We overcome this by actively rotating the Raman mirrors during the pulse sequence to cancel the time-dependent angular offset. The implementation relies on a decouplable calibration-compensation chain to remove rotation-induced time-dependent terms. The scheme is validated on a dual-atom-interferometer gyroscope with an interference area of 21.1 cm^2. After compensation, the phase's dependence on atomic velocity is reduced 40-fold, and the velocity contribution to scale-factor stability is evaluated to be 0.13 ppm. The sensor achieves a rotation sensitivity of 1.3\times10^{-8} rad/s/Hz^{1/2} and a stability of 1.9\times10^{-10} rad/s at 4500 s integration, together with a common-mode noise rejection ratio of up to 459, demonstrated in a seismic event. This work removes a key obstacle to scale-factor stabilization in atom-interferometer gyroscopes and paves the way for their applications in inertial navigation and geophysics.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper demonstrates a dynamical Raman mirror rotation and calibration chain that restores velocity immunity in a large-area dual-atom interferometer gyroscope degraded by Earth-rotation Coriolis effects.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 论文通过动态旋转拉曼镜与标定补偿链路，抵消地球自转科里奥利效应带来的破坏，从而在大面积双原子干涉仪陀螺中恢复速度免疫。
summary_en: Problem: Earth-rotation Coriolis effects break the intrinsic velocity immunity of Mach-Zehnder atom-interferometer gyroscopes, limiting scale-factor stability.

Approach: Actively rotate Raman mirrors during the pulse sequence and use a decouplable calibration-compensation chain (contrast loop closure, position–velocity coupling calibration, and time-dependent dynamic cancellation).
Key result: In a 21.1 cm²-area dual-atom gyroscope, the velocity dependence of the rotation phase is reduced 40-fold and the velocity contribution to scale-factor instability is 0.13 ppm.
summary_zh: 问题：地球自转的科里奥利效应会破坏马赫-曾德尔原子干涉仪陀螺的固有速度免疫，降低比例因子稳定性。
方法：在脉冲序列中主动旋转拉曼镜，并采用可解耦的标定补偿链（对比度闭环、位置-速度耦合标定、以及对时间变化项的动态抵消）。
关键结果：在面积为21.1 cm²的双原子陀螺中，旋转相位对原子速度的依赖降低40倍，速度对比例因子不稳定性的贡献为0.13 ppm。
analysis.contribution_en: Introduces and experimentally validates a dynamic Raman mirror compensation scheme that restores velocity immunity in a large-area dual-atom interferometer gyroscope under Earth-rotation, enabling improved scale-factor stability.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出并实验验证了一种动态拉曼镜补偿方案，使在地球自转条件下的大面积双原子干涉仪陀螺能够恢复速度免疫，从而提升比例因子稳定性。
analysis.method_en: A three-stage workflow combining (1) contrast-based alignment to close the interferometer loop, (2) phase-based calibration of position–velocity coupling angles via controlled interrogation timing/velocity, and (3) dynamic mirror tilting during the Raman pulse sequence to cancel the time-dependent Earth-rotation angular offset in a dual-loop, common-mode-rejected gyroscope.
analysis.method_zh: 采用三阶段流程：（1）基于干涉对比度的对准以闭合干涉环；（2）通过调制相位与实验时间/速度标定位置-速度耦合角；（3）在拉曼脉冲序列期间动态倾转镜面，抵消双环系统中由地球自转引入的时间相关角度偏移，并利用双干涉仪共模抑制。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Not specified as a geophysical region for the compensation study; sensor validation uses seismic events from east of Honshu, Japan (Nov 9, 2025) at magnitudes 6.8 and 6.4.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 未说明补偿验证的具体研究区域；地球物理验证使用日本本州东部（2025年11月9日）两次地震数据，震级分别为6.8和6.4。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Directly relevant to geophysics because the improved long-term rotational stability and seismic-event common-mode rejection make atom-interferometer gyroscopes more practical for inertial navigation and monitoring.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与地球物理直接相关：提升的长期旋转稳定性以及对地震事件的共模抑制，使原子干涉仪陀螺更适用于惯性导航与地球物理监测。

paper.title: The flow deep within granular piles
paper.abstract: Grain piles embody the complex mechanics and kinematics of disordered granular materials, including solid-like and fluid-like behaviours, complex kinematics, and preparation history-dependent stress variation. It is widely believed that the bulk of a growing pile is static and flow is confined to a thin layer at the surface, but very few studies have investigated the subsurface kinematics. Here we study the flow within conical grain piles by flow imaging experiments and particle dynamics simulations. We provide direct evidence of continuous plastic flow deep within piles as grains are poured from above, and show that the direction of flow varies smoothly from vertical at the symmetry axis to parallel to the surface at the periphery. Our findings provide new insight into the kinematics and rheology of granular media, including the nature of creep in seemingly solid-like regions, and have important implications for geophysical phenomena such as landslides and industrial processes.

analysis.one_sentence_en: By combining flow imaging under a transparent base with discrete element simulations, the authors show that conical granular piles exhibit continuous plastic flow throughout their interior, with smoothly varying flow direction from axis to periphery.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 结合透底流动成像与离散元模拟，作者发现锥形颗粒堆内部存在持续塑性流动，流向从中心轴到边缘逐渐转为近表面方向。
summary_en: problem: Test the prevailing assumption that bulk of a growing conical granular pile is static and that flow is confined to a thin surface layer.

approach: Use base-under-view flow imaging (particle image velocimetry) on free-standing conical piles plus DEM simulations to quantify subsurface velocities and compare scaling with pile and deposition parameters.

key result: The pile shows measurable, nonzero flow and plastic deformation down to the base; the flow direction changes smoothly from vertical at the axis to tangential near the periphery, and velocity profiles at the base match DEM with distinct radial regions.
summary_zh: problem: 评估传统观点——锥形颗粒堆生长时内部大体静止、流动仅局限于表层薄层——是否成立。
approach: 在透明底下用流动成像与颗粒图像测速测量基底径向速度，并用离散元模拟获得全场速度/应力/密度，检验随堆尺寸与沉积率的规律。
key result: 实验与模拟表明颗粒堆从上覆沉积开始在体内持续发生塑性流动，基底处仍有可测流速；流向从中心轴附近的竖直逐渐平滑转为边缘近表面的方向，且基底速度剖面与DEM相符并呈现分区特征。
analysis.contribution_en: Provides direct experimental evidence of deep, continuous plastic flow in growing conical granular piles, supported by DEM full-field validation, including flow-direction topology and base-velocity scaling across pile sizes, deposition rates, grain types, and base roughness.
analysis.contribution_zh: 给出锥形颗粒堆内部深部持续塑性流动的直接实验证据，并用离散元获得的全场量进行验证；揭示从轴到边缘的流向拓扑，并在不同堆尺寸、沉积率、颗粒与底面粗糙度条件下给出基底速度标度规律。
analysis.method_en: Free-standing conical piles formed by continuous pouring onto a transparent base; video imaging through the base combined with particle image velocimetry to obtain basal velocity fields, complemented by DEM (discrete element method) simulations providing velocity, stress, and density fields throughout the pile.
analysis.method_zh: 将颗粒以恒定流率从上方沉积到透明基底上形成自由支撑的锥形堆；通过透明底进行视频成像并用颗粒图像测速获得基底速度场；同时用离散元法DEM模拟来获得堆体内部的速度、应力与密度全场。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Laboratory conical granular piles on a transparent acrylic base; materials include glass beads, mustard seeds, and beach sand, with varying pile base diameter and hopper orifice (deposition rate); also tests of smooth vs rough base via cavity roughening. No external geophysical region is used.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 实验室透明丙烯酸底上的锥形颗粒堆；材料包括玻璃珠、芥子与海滩砂，改变基底直径与漏斗开口（沉积率）；并比较光滑底与通过腔体构造粗糙化后的粗糙底。未使用外部地球物理观测区域。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Relevant because landslide/avalanche initiation and creep can depend on whether granular hillslopes deform only near the surface or throughout the bulk; the demonstrated deep plastic flow challenges a surface-only picture.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与地球物理相关：滑坡/雪崩的起动与蠕变可能取决于颗粒斜坡是否仅表层变形还是会在体内持续塑性流动；本文结果对“仅表面流动”的图景提出挑战。

paper.title: Modeling the Effect of the Heliospheric Magnetic Field on Cosmic Ray Muon Shadows
paper.abstract: Shadows cast in the cosmic ray (CR) muon sky by the Sun were located using muon data from the MINOS far detector in Northern Minnesota. The shadows were observed independently across three time periods; near solar minimum, near solar maximum, and over the entire 13 year span of the data. A distribution of muon positions for each shadow was then sampled to simulate CR motions near the Sun using the Parker spiral model of the Heliospheric Magnetic Field (HMF) and a dipole model of the Geomagnetic Field (GMF). The resulting particle distributions were then compared to their position with respect to the Sun. Results show that the Parker spiral model is most consistent with the solar minimum shadow and least consistent with the solar maximum shadow, as expected. The simple Parker spiral is more consistent with the data for a harder CR spectrum than is actually present, indicating the need for a more detailed HMF model. Plausible modifications to the Parker spiral model which would affect the overall shift of the Sun's CR shadow are discussed.

analysis.one_sentence_en: Using MINOS muon measurements of the Sun’s cosmic-ray shadow across solar minimum and maximum, the study simulates muon angular distributions with Parker-spiral heliospheric and dipole geomagnetic fields to test HMF models.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 利用MINOS探测到的太阳宇宙线缪子影在太阳活动极小/极大期的观测数据，作者用帕克螺旋型太阳风磁场与偶极地磁场模拟并检验其对影像偏移的解释能力。
summary_en: problem: Determine how the heliospheric magnetic field (HMF) shapes the Sun’s cosmic-ray muon shadow and which HMF description matches different solar-cycle conditions.

approach: Locate Sun shadows from MINOS muon arrival directions in three time periods, then run Monte Carlo simulations of cosmic-ray trajectories using a Parker spiral HMF plus a dipole geomagnetic field and compare the resulting angular distributions to the observed shadow position.

key result: The simple Parker spiral best matches the solar-minimum shadow but fits poorly for solar-maximum, and its agreement depends on assuming a harder cosmic-ray spectrum than observed—indicating the need for a more detailed HMF model, with plausible Parker-spiral modifications discussed.
summary_zh: problem: 量化太阳-宇宙线缪子“影”如何受日球层磁场影响，并评估在不同太阳活动条件下哪种HMF描述更吻合观测。
approach: 用MINOS到达方向数据在多个时间段定位太阳影位置，然后用蒙特卡洛模拟宇宙线在帕克螺旋型HMF与偶极地磁场中的运动，比较模拟得到的角分布与观测到的太阳影偏移。
key result: 简化帕克螺旋在太阳极小期最一致、在太阳极大期最不一致；其对数据的匹配要求使用比实际更硬的宇宙线谱，表明需要更精细的HMF模型，并讨论了可能影响太阳影整体偏移的帕克螺旋修正。
analysis.contribution_en: The work provides a quantitative, solar-cycle-resolved test of heliospheric magnetic field prescriptions using the Sun’s cosmic-ray muon shadow measured by MINOS, showing that a simple Parker-spiral model cannot simultaneously reproduce solar-minimum and solar-maximum behavior without additional HMF complexity.
analysis.contribution_zh: 该研究用MINOS观测到的太阳宇宙线缪子影，在不同太阳活动阶段对日球层磁场模型进行了定量检验，结果表明简单帕克螺旋模型难以在不引入更复杂HMF的情况下同时解释太阳极小与太阳极大时期的影子行为。
analysis.method_en: Reconstruct single-muon arrival directions in the MINOS far detector, locate the Sun shadow via a likelihood/template-based sky-histogram procedure, then perform Monte Carlo simulations of cosmic-ray deflections using the Parker spiral HMF and a dipole geomagnetic field, incorporating scattering and the detector response through shadow templates, and compare simulated muon position distributions relative to the Sun.
analysis.method_zh: 在MINOS远探测器中重建单缪子的到达方向，利用基于似然与影子模板的二维天空直方图方法定位太阳影；随后用包含探测器/散射效应的影子模板，在蒙特卡洛中使用帕克螺旋日球层磁场与偶极地磁场模拟宇宙线偏转，生成相对太阳的缪子位置分布并与观测影子位置进行对比。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Northern Minnesota (Soudan Mine) MINOS far detector; muon data spanning 13 years (July 2003–July 2016) with three analyzed periods: near solar minimum (Jan 2007–Dec 2009) and near solar maximum (Jan 2012–Dec 2014), plus the full span.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 北明尼苏达（Soudan Mine）MINOS远探测器；13年宇宙线缪子数据（2003年7月–2016年7月），分析三个时间段：太阳极小附近（2007年1月–2009年12月）与太阳极大附近（2012年1月–2014年12月），以及全时段。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is relevant to heliospheric magnetic-field inference from cosmic-ray anisotropy/deflection, using a ground-based muon shadow observable rather than geophysical radar/inversion, so it is moderately related to geophysics but directly targets space-weather/solar-cycle effects.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 这项工作与利用宇宙线各向异性/偏转来反演日球层磁场有关，但观测量来自地面宇宙线缪子影而非传统地球物理成像或反演，因此与当前“地球物理”追踪主题关联中等，且更聚焦空间天气与太阳活动周期效应。

paper.title: Downstream patterns in bedrock valley morphology encode climatic and tectonic forcing
paper.abstract: Fluvially-carved bedrock valleys are ubiquitous landscape features. Vertical incision into underlying bedrock generates valley relief, whereas lateral migration of the river channel widens the valley floor as the river erodes the valley walls. The relative efficacy of these processes, which can be modulated by precipitation and water discharge, sediment supply, lithology, and uplift rates is recorded by the relationship between valley width, channel width, and valley relief at a cross-section. Numerous studies have interpreted differences in bedrock valley morphology to be evidence for variability in tectonics, climate, or geology, or as evidence of landscape disequilibrium. However, expected downstream covariation of these parameters under steady-state conditions has not been yet thoroughly explored. This contribution develops a 1-D profile model to describe expected downstream coevolution of channel width, valley width, and valley relief, described holistically using a valley confinement index. Model predictions agree well with data from seven catchments in the King Range, CA spanning a gradient in tectonic uplift and precipitation. Systematic variations in valley morphology correspond with differences in the Erosion number between catchments, which summarizes the combined effect of multiple factors that influence fluvial bedrock incision. These results suggest that longitudinal patterns in bedrock valley morphology provide a promising, holistic metric to interpret the relative influence of tectonics, climate, and lithology on bedrock valley formation in detachment-limited landscapes.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper presents a 1-D valley confinement framework that predicts downstream coevolution of channel width, valley width, and relief, matching King Range catchment data and linking systematic morphology patterns to combined erosion controls.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该论文提出一维“谷地约束指数”框架来预测通道宽度、谷底宽度与谷地起伏的下游协同演化，并在加州金王山流域数据上验证其规律与多因素侵蚀效应一致。
summary_en: Problem: Bedrock valley morphologies are often used to infer climate, tectonics, or disequilibrium, but expected downstream covariation under steady conditions is not well tested.
Approach: Develop a 1-D profile model that jointly links channel width, valley width, and valley relief via a valley confinement index and compare with multi-catchment observations.
Key result: Model predictions match data from seven King Range catchments, and longitudinal morphology patterns systematically track differences in erosion number across catchments.
summary_zh: 问题：基岩河谷形态常被用来指示气候、构造或景观不平衡，但稳态条件下这些参数的下游协同变化尚未充分检验。
方法：构建一维剖面模型，将通道宽度、谷底宽度与谷地起伏通过“谷地约束指数”整体联系起来，并与多流域观测对比。
关键结果：模型在加州金王山七个流域上与数据吻合，且谷地形态的纵向格局随流域间“侵蚀数”差异系统变化。
analysis.contribution_en: It formulates and validates a 1-D, holistic valley-morphology metric (valley confinement index) that predicts downstream coevolution of channel width, valley width, and relief and connects observed longitudinal patterns to an integrated erosion control parameter (erosion number).
analysis.contribution_zh: 它提出并验证了一个一维的整体性谷地形态度量（谷地约束指数），可预测通道宽度、谷底宽度与起伏的下游协同演化，并将观测到的纵向形态格局与综合侵蚀控制参数（侵蚀数）联系起来。
analysis.method_en: A 1-D profile model of bedrock valley coevolution in which channel width, valley width, and valley relief are linked through a valley confinement index, then validated against cross-sectional morphological measurements from multiple catchments.
analysis.method_zh: 建立基岩河谷演化的一维剖面模型，用“谷地约束指数”将通道宽度、谷底宽度与谷地起伏进行整体耦合，并用多个流域的剖面形态测量进行验证。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Seven catchments in the King Range, California, spanning gradients in tectonic uplift and precipitation.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 加州金王山（King Range）的七个流域，覆盖构造抬升与降水的变化梯度。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is relevant to geomorphic interpretation of tectonic–climatic signals in bedrock landscapes by providing an explicit expectation for downstream width–relief covariation, though it is not directly an instrumentation or geophysical inversion study.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 这对用河谷地貌解译基岩景观中的构造-气候信号具有重要意义，因为它给出了下游宽度—起伏协变的可检验预期；但它并非直接面向仪器观测或地球物理反演的研究。

paper.title: Shock wave formation in the thermosphere by an earthgrazing fireball: Empirical evidence for volatile-enhanced hydrodynamic shielding
paper.abstract: Hydrodynamic shielding is a theoretically well-established but observationally elusive and experimentally difficult-to-replicate phenomenon with implications that extend far beyond meteor physics. Rare earthgrazing meteoroids with infrasound signatures that penetrate to the ground can be used to probe hydrodynamic shielding that leads to strong shock formation at high altitude. Here, we report the first coordinated optical and multi-station infrasound observations of a centimeter-scale earthgrazing fireball that generated sustained cylindrical line shock at thermospheric altitudes near 92 km. The event was recorded by numerous optical stations and three infrasound arrays, allowing trajectory reconstruction, ablation behavior, acoustic source localization, and shock characteristics. Optical observations indicate early mechanical erosion and ablation/evaporation at exceptionally low dynamic pressure, consistent with a cometary or a porous, volatile-bearing CM chondritic object. Independent infrasound detections localize shock generation to multiple points along a 164 km trajectory segment near perigee. Weak-shock modeling yields a consistent blast radius of ~30 m, implying an acoustic-equivalent source size far exceeding the physical dimensions of the ~45 g nucleus. We demonstrate that classical gas dynamics and ablation-driven hydrodynamic shielding alone cannot account for these observations under ambient thermospheric conditions. We show that volatile release provides the additional flow-field density enhancement required to amplify hydrodynamic shielding, reduce the effective local Knudsen number, and sustain a shock envelope capable of radiating detectable infrasound. These results demonstrate that small, volatile-rich meteoroids can transiently establish continuum-like flow in rarefied environments.

analysis.one_sentence_en: Coordinated optical and multi-array infrasound observations of a 2020 centimeter-scale earthgrazing fireball show sustained thermospheric line shocks near 92 km that require volatile-enhanced hydrodynamic shielding beyond classical ablation alone.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 2020年一次厘米尺度掠地火球的光学与多站红外声（次声）联合观测表明其在约92 km处形成持续线状冲击，必须由挥发物增强的流体动力屏蔽解释。
summary_en: problem: Hydrodynamic shielding should enable shock formation in rarefied upper-atmospheric entry, but direct observations of its development for earthgrazers are largely missing.

approach: The authors combine overconstrained optical triangulation and grain-based photometric ablation modeling with KNMI multi-station infrasound detection, beamforming, ray-tracing propagation, and shock-source localization.

key result: A coordinated event produced sustained cylindrical line shocks near 92 km along a ~164 km trajectory, and neither classical gas dynamics nor ablation-driven shielding under ambient thermospheric conditions can reproduce the observations; volatile release is inferred to enhance shielding and maintain a shock-capable envelope.
summary_zh: problem: 流体动力屏蔽可在稀薄上层大气入口中促成激波，但掠地火球条件下其形成过程的直接观测证据很缺乏。
approach: 研究者将多站光学三角测量与颗粒消融光度建模，结合KNMI多站次声检测/波束形成、三维声传播射线追踪与冲击源定位。
key result: 该事件在约92 km附近的约164 km轨迹段上产生持续圆柱线状激波；在热层环境条件下仅靠经典气体动力学与消融驱动屏蔽无法解释，挥发物释放被认为可增强流场密度并维持可辐射次声的冲击包络。
analysis.contribution_en: This work provides the first coordinated optical and multi-station infrasound constraints on thermospheric shock generation by a centimeter-scale earthgrazer and shows observationally that volatile release can amplify ablation-driven hydrodynamic shielding to sustain line shocks in rarefied flow where continuum theory alone would predict weak or absent shocks.
analysis.contribution_zh: 本文首次给出掠地小体在热层产生激波的光学与多站次声协同观测约束，并表明：挥发物释放能在稀薄流动中增强消融驱动的流体动力屏蔽，从而维持可产生次声的线状激波，而经典气体动力学解释不足。
analysis.method_en: Use optical network triangulation across multiple meteor cameras to reconstruct an orbit/trajectory, model photometry with a grain erosion/ablation framework to infer dynamic-pressure and ablation behavior, detect coherent infrasound arrivals with beamforming (F-stat) across three KNMI microbarometer arrays, localize acoustic source points via 3D eigenray ray-tracing using atmospheric profiles from the G2S model, and compare observed shock characteristics with weak-shock modeling and gas-dynamics expectations.
analysis.method_zh: 利用多摄像机网络的光学三角测量重建轨迹，采用颗粒侵蚀/消融的光度模型估计动态压与消融行为；用三套KNMI微气压计阵列的波束形成（F统计量）检测并确认次声到达相干信号；再结合G2S得到的热层大气剖面，用三维本征射线追踪完成声源点定位，并将观测到的冲击特征与弱激波模型及仅气体动力学预测进行对比。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Northern Europe (northern Germany to the UK) for the 22 Sep 2020 earthgrazing fireball; optical data from 23 meteor patrol cameras and infrasound data from three KNMI arrays (EXL, DBN, CIA).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 北欧地区（德国北部至英国）2020年9月22日的一次掠地火球事件；光学数据来自23个流星巡查相机，次声数据来自三套KNMI阵列（EXL、DBN、CIA）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: For tracking this topic, the study strongly supports a key physics link between rarefied-flow shock formation and hydrodynamic shielding, extending observational evidence by adding a volatile-release control knob for continued thermospheric shocks; relevance is direct to rarefied hypersonic coupling and shock radiative processes.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 对当前追踪主题而言，该研究直接强化了“稀薄流动中激波形成—流体动力屏蔽”的物理联系，并进一步加入“挥发物释放”这一关键调控机制，可解释热层持续冲击及其可检测次声的辐射过程，因此相关性很强。

paper.title: Multifractal Complexity of the Chandler Wobble and Its Anomalous Disappearance (2015--2020): A MFDFA Study
paper.abstract: The Chandler wobble (CW) -- the $\sim$433-day free nutation of Earth's rotation pole -- experienced an anomalous near-disappearance between 2015 and 2020, followed by a re-excitation with an approximately $180^{\circ}$ phase reversal. Using Multifractal Detrended Fluctuation Analysis (MFDFA) applied to more than six decades (1962--2024) of daily IERS EOP C04 polar motion data, this study provides the first multifractal characterisation of the CW and its recent anomaly. Global MFDFA shows that the residual polar motion components and the CW amplitude are genuine multifractal processes with strongly $q$-dependent generalised Hurst exponents and broad singularity spectra. Surrogate-data tests with shuffled and phase-randomised ensembles demonstrate that this multifractality originates from the combined action of long-range temporal correlations and heavy-tailed excitation statistics. A sliding-window analysis reveals a pronounced collapse in long-range persistence and multifractal spectral width of the geometric polar motion signal several years before and during the 2015--2020 amplitude minimum, indicating a genuine dynamical regime change rather than a simple suppression of oscillation amplitude. In contrast, the amplitude- and phase-related variables retain broad multifractal spectra and stable scaling exponents across all epochs, revealing a dynamical decoupling between the geometry of the CW and the multiscale structure of its amplitude and phase fluctuations. These findings highlight the CW amplitude as an exceptionally multifractal integrator of geophysical excitation and suggest that multifractal metrics may provide early-warning indicators of major transitions in Earth rotation dynamics.

analysis.one_sentence_en: Using multifractal detrended fluctuation analysis on decades of IERS polar-motion records, the study finds that the Chandler wobble’s geometry, amplitude, and phase separate dynamically, with early multifractal signatures preceding its 2015–2020 near-disappearance.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 利用对IERS极移记录的MFDFA分析，研究发现钱德勒摆几何、振幅与相位存在动力学解耦，并在2015—2020年近消失前出现多重分形量的提前信号。
summary_en: Problem: Determine whether the Chandler wobble’s anomalous 2015–2020 near-disappearance reflects only reduced amplitude or a genuine change in multiscale statistical structure.

Approach: Apply MFDFA to detrended polar-motion residuals and to extracted CW amplitude and phase (plus amplitude increments), using surrogate-data shuffling and phase randomization and a sliding-window timeline.

Key result: The CW residual components and amplitude are genuinely multifractal from long-range correlations combined with heavy-tailed excitation, with a collapse in long-range persistence and multifractal spectral width of the geometric signal around the 2015–2020 minimum, while amplitude/phase variables retain stable multifractal scaling, indicating dynamical decoupling and a potential early-warning transition indicator.
summary_zh: 问题：判定钱德勒摆2015—2020年近消失是仅振幅变小，还是伴随多尺度统计结构的真实改变。
方法：对去趋势的极移残差及提取的CW振幅与相位（以及振幅增量）进行MFDFA，并用洗牌/相位随机化的替代数据检验来源，同时做滑动窗口的时间演化分析。
关键结果：极移残差分量与CW振幅呈真实多重分形，来源于长程相关与厚尾激励的共同作用；在2015—2020振幅最低期前后，几何极移信号的长程持久性与多重分形谱宽显著塌缩，而振幅/相位变量的多重分形谱与标度指数保持稳定，显示几何与振幅/相位的动力学解耦。
analysis.contribution_en: Provides the first multifractal characterization of the Chandler wobble and its 2015–2020 anomaly, separating the origins of multifractality via surrogate tests and identifying an epoch of altered scaling in the CW geometry preceding the amplitude minimum.
analysis.contribution_zh: 首次给出钱德勒摆及其2015—2020异常的多重分形刻画；通过替代数据检验分离多重分形的来源，并发现一个在振幅最低期之前改变缩放特性的“几何”阶段。
analysis.method_en: MFDFA on detrended IERS polar-motion residuals; CW extracted via bandpass filtering around the ~433-day frequency, then instantaneous amplitude and unwrapped phase via Hilbert transform; multifractality assessed with q-dependent generalized Hurst exponents/singularity spectra; surrogate-data tests using shuffling and phase randomization; sliding-window MFDFA over multiple physically motivated epochs; comparisons between geometry-like variables and amplitude/phase variables.
analysis.method_zh: 对去趋势的IERS极移残差进行MFDFA；用围绕约433天周期的带通滤波提取CW，并通过希尔伯特变换获得瞬时振幅与解包相位；用q相关的广义Hurst指数与奇异谱评估多重分形；用洗牌与相位随机化进行替代数据检验；采用滑动窗口MFDFA并跨物理动因划分的多个时间阶段，对比“几何”变量与振幅/相位变量。
analysis.data_or_region_en: IERS EOP C04 Earth orientation parameters polar motion (x_p, y_p), daily time series from 1962–2024 (with CW extraction around the ~0.843 cycles/year Chandler frequency).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: IERS EOP C04地球定向参数中的极移（x_p、y_p）日序列，时间跨度1962—2024年（并在约0.843 cycles/year的钱德勒频率附近提取CW）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Chandler wobble study is only tangential to typical geophysical tracking topics (e.g., earthquakes/InSAR), but it is directly relevant to monitoring Earth-rotation dynamics and could motivate multifractal early-warning indicators in other geophysical excitation systems.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 该研究聚焦地球自转极移/钱德勒摆，和常见的地球物理追踪主题（如地震或InSAR）关联较弱；但它与监测地球自转动力学、推广基于多重分形的早期预警指标具有启发性。

paper.title: Geometric Origin of Macroscopic Alignment in Granular Flows
paper.abstract: Predicting the alignment of non-spherical particles in dense granular flows under shear remains a central challenge in soft matter physics. We demonstrate that the first-order behavior of granular fabric,the anisotropic distribution of contacts, is a direct consequence of particle boundary geometry. By assuming uniform contact probability along a particle's perimeter, we derive a mapping between local curvature and the macroscopic distribution of contact normals. This minimal geometric framework accurately predicts the uniaxial nematic order parameter S2 observed in both three-dimensional discrete element simulations and laboratory experiments using various particle geometries (e.g., rice, fibers, and disks) across a wide range of aspect ratios. Our results show that particle shape dictates the available orientation statistics, providing a purely geometric baseline for the emergence of fabric in dense granular systems.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper shows that dense-shear granular fabric alignment can be predicted from particle boundary geometry by mapping uniformly sampled contact locations to contact-normal statistics via curvature weighting, matching simulations and rice-grain experiments.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 本文表明，在密集剪切颗粒流中，接触法向统计可由粒子边界曲率的几何映射预测，从而无需动力学细节即可较好复现实验与数值中的单轴二向性序参数。
summary_en: problem: Predicting the shear-induced nematic fabric (contact anisotropy) of non-spherical particles in dense granular flows from first principles remains challenging.

approach: Assume uniform probability of contacts along a particle perimeter, derive a curvature-based mapping from boundary geometry to contact-normal orientation distributions, and compute the resulting S2 order parameter.

key result: The curvature-driven geometric framework accurately reproduces S2 across a wide aspect-ratio range in 3D DEM and laboratory experiments for diverse shapes, with poorer but explainable performance for some limiting geometries (e.g., disks/rods using a rectangle approximation).
summary_zh: problem: 如何从第一性原理预测密集颗粒剪切下非球形颗粒的织构（接触各向异性）仍是难题。
approach: 假设沿粒子周长接触概率均匀，通过边界曲率对接触法向取向分布进行几何映射，并由此计算单轴序参数S2。
key result: 该基于曲率的几何框架能在较宽长宽比范围内准确复现实验与三维DEM中的S2；对某些形状（如用矩形近似描述的圆盘/杆）的一致性较弱但可由形状极限解释。
analysis.contribution_en: Provides a minimal, curvature-based first-principles geometric mapping from particle boundary shape to the contact-normal orientation distribution, yielding quantitative predictions of the terminal nematic order parameter S2 without explicitly modeling force-chain dynamics.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出一个最小的基于曲率的几何映射框架：将粒子边界形状直接映射到接触法向取向分布，从而在不显式建模力链动力学的情况下对稳态二向性序参数S2给出定量预测。
analysis.method_en: Derive contact-normal orientation probability from perimeter-arc-length to normal-angle change of variables under the assumption of uniform contact sampling along the particle boundary; use curvature weighting to generate orientation ensembles (via analytical forms for ellipses and perimeter sampling for rectangles), then compute the nematic order parameter S2 from the eigenvalues of the symmetric traceless orientation tensor.
analysis.method_zh: 在“沿粒子边界接触位置均匀取样”的假设下，通过周长弧长到法向角度的变量变换，将接触法向概率与曲率加权关联；对椭圆形状使用解析表达并进行取样，对矩形等分段平坦形状直接按周长均匀采样生成取向集合，随后用对称无迹取向张量的最大特征值计算S2。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Not specified (comparison uses 3D frictional DEM datasets of ellipsoids and experiments on rice grains; particle shapes include ellipsoids, fibers, disks, and disks/rods approximated by rectangular cross-sections).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 未说明（主要与3D摩擦颗粒离散元DEM数据以及水稻颗粒实验进行对比；形状包含椭球、纤维、圆盘，并对圆盘/杆使用矩形截面近似）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is moderately relevant because it concerns granular fabric evolution under shear; the geometric baseline for contact anisotropy could help interpret and model shape-controlled rheology and anisotropic properties in geophysical granular flows, though it is not a direct geophysical observation/instrument study.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与当前追踪主题有中等相关性，因为它研究的是颗粒剪切下织构演化；粒子形状主导的接触各向异性几何基线可用于理解与建模地球物理颗粒流中的各向异性流变性质，但它并非直接面向特定地球物理观测或仪器的研究。

paper.title: Unified sparse framework for large-scale material point method simulations
paper.abstract: The material point method (MPM) is a hybrid particle-grid method widely used for simulating large deformation with history-dependent behavior. Standard MPM often relies on a dense background grid, which can be highly inefficient when material occupies a small fraction of the computational domain. Such sparsity is common in many large-scale problems, from geophysical mass flows over large terrain domains to visual-computing applications. Here, we introduce a unified sparse background-grid framework for large-scale MPM simulation. The framework treats sparse grid construction as a general active-node indexing problem. We develop two architecture-specific implementations to realize the same sparse framework: a scan-based strategy for CPUs and a hash-based strategy for GPUs. Through benchmark problems and a large-scale landslide simulation, we show that the framework provides the same results as standard dense MPM while reducing computational time and memory usage by one to two orders of magnitude in strongly sparse cases.

analysis.one_sentence_en: This paper introduces a unified sparse background-grid framework for material point method (MPM) simulations that keeps dense-MPM accuracy while drastically cutting runtime and memory for strongly sparse geophysical cases.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 本文提出一种统一的稀疏背景网格框架用于物质点法MPM模拟，在保证与稠密方法一致性的同时显著降低强稀疏情形的计算时间和内存占用。
summary_en: Problem: Standard MPM uses a dense background grid, wasting computation and memory when material occupies only a small fraction of a large potential domain (common in large-runout geophysical flows).
Approach: Represent the sparse grid via an active-node set and a compact indexing map, implemented on CPUs with a scan-based compact indexing and on GPUs with a hash-table-based indexing.

Key result: Across benchmarks and a large-scale landslide simulation, the sparse framework matches standard dense MPM outputs while reducing computational time and memory by one to two orders of magnitude in strongly sparse cases.
summary_zh: 问题：传统MPM采用稠密背景网格，当材料仅占据大计算域的一小部分时会造成计算与内存的巨大浪费（地球物理大规模质量流常见）。
方法：用“活动节点集合”和“紧凑索引映射”刻画稀疏网格；CPU端采用扫描式紧凑编号，GPU端采用哈希表式编号。
关键结果：在多个基准算例和一项大规模滑坡模拟中，该稀疏框架与稠密MPM获得一致的结果，并在强稀疏场景下将计算时间和内存降低一个到两个数量级。
analysis.contribution_en: The main contribution is a hardware-agnostic sparse MPM formulation that treats sparse background-grid construction as an active-node indexing problem, together with two architecture-specific implementations (CPU scan-based and GPU hash-based) and open-source code supporting adoption.
analysis.contribution_zh: 主要贡献是提出一种与硬件无关的稀疏MPM表述：将稀疏背景网格构建抽象为活动节点的索引问题，并给出CPU扫描式与GPU哈希式两种面向架构的实现，同时提供开源代码便于他人采用。
analysis.method_en: Material points transfer to and from a background grid as in standard MPM, but only grid nodes within particle shape-function support are marked active; an active-node set is built each timestep and assigned compact indices to store/update nodal quantities only for active nodes, using scan-based prefix-sum indexing on CPUs and hash-table insertion/lookup indexing on GPUs.
analysis.method_zh: 与标准MPM相同，物质点在每步将量从粒子转移到背景网格并再插值回粒子；不同的是仅将位于粒子形函数支持域内的网格节点标记为活动节点，并为活动节点构建紧凑索引以只存储/更新其节点量；CPU采用扫描式前缀和编号，GPU采用哈希表插入/查找进行编号。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Not specified; evaluation uses benchmark deformation problems (sliding box, granular collapse) and a large-scale simulation of the 2025 Blatten landslide in Switzerland.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 未说明具体数据集来源；评估包含基准形变算例（滑块、颗粒坍塌）以及瑞士的2025年Blatten滑坡大规模模拟。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Directly relevant to scalable simulation of gravity-driven mass flows (e.g., landslides) where sparse occupancy over a large domain makes standard dense MPM inefficient.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与地球物理重力驱动的质量流（如滑坡）强相关：这类问题在巨大计算域内往往活动区域稀疏，稠密MPM会非常低效。

paper.title: A Method for Imaging Interplanetary Magnetic Field Strength and Orientation
paper.abstract: Measurements of interplanetary magnetic fields have long relied on spacecraft measurements, which provide only in-situ sampling and therefore cannot capture the global magnetic structure. Faraday rotation of radio signals extends in-situ measurements to line-of-sight measurements, but it still depends on the number and spatial distribution of available radio sources. The Zeeman effect offers another route to remote sensing of magnetic fields, but it is generally too weak to diagnose the weak interplanetary magnetic fields. Here, we present a remote-sensing method to constrain weak magnetic field strength and orientation using spectral-line polarization induced by ground-state alignment (GSA) and Hanle effect, with collisional effects taken into account. This method is sensitive to weak magnetic fields in environments ranging from the high solar atmosphere and solar wind to the outer heliosphere, and we identify suitable spectral lines for different targets. We further perform forward modeling of Mercury's magnetosphere to demonstrate the feasibility of this imaging method. Spectral-polarization imaging therefore provides a new way toward remote imaging of dynamic heliospheric magnetic structures.

analysis.one_sentence_en: The paper develops a remote-sensing approach that uses spectral-line polarization from ground-state alignment and the Hanle effect, including collisions, to image weak interplanetary magnetic-field strength and orientation and demonstrate feasibility with forward modeling of Mercury’s magnetosphere.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该论文提出一种基于地面态对齐与韩勒效应产生的谱线偏振、并考虑碰撞效应的远程成像方法，可约束微弱星际/行星际磁场的强度与方向，并用水星磁层的前向建模验证可行性。
summary_en: problem: In-situ spacecraft measurements cannot capture global interplanetary magnetic-field structure, and existing remote techniques are limited by source availability or insufficient sensitivity to weak fields.

approach: Use spectral-line polarization caused by ground-state alignment and the Hanle effect, with collisional effects included, to infer both magnetic-field strength and orientation and select appropriate spectral lines for targets.
key result: Forward modeling of Mercury’s magnetosphere is used to demonstrate the feasibility of imaging dynamic heliospheric magnetic structures with this spectral-polarization approach.
summary_zh: problem: 原位航天器测量难以获得行星际磁场的全局结构，而现有远程方法要么受射电源分布限制，要么对微弱磁场不够敏感。
approach: 利用由地面态对齐与韩勒效应引起的谱线偏振，并纳入碰撞效应，以同时约束磁场强度和方向，再为不同目标选择合适谱线。
key result: 通过对水星磁层进行前向建模，证明该谱线偏振成像方法实现弱磁场成像的可行性。
analysis.contribution_en: It provides a physics-based remote-sensing framework for imaging weak interplanetary magnetic-field strength and orientation using spectral-line polarization (GSA plus Hanle effect) with collisional effects, along with target-dependent spectral-line identification and feasibility demonstration via Mercury magnetosphere modeling.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出了一个基于谱线偏振（地面态对齐+韩勒效应）并考虑碰撞效应的远程成像框架，用于成像微弱行星际磁场的强度与方向；同时给出面向不同目标的谱线选择，并用水星磁层的建模验证可行性。
analysis.method_en: Spectral-polarization remote sensing leveraging ground-state alignment and the Hanle effect to infer magnetic-field strength and orientation, with collisional effects incorporated; includes forward modeling of a planetary magnetosphere and selection of diagnostic spectral lines for different heliospheric environments.
analysis.method_zh: 利用地面态对齐与韩勒效应产生的谱线偏振进行远程观测反演磁场强度与方向，并在理论计算中纳入碰撞效应；通过行星磁层前向建模验证，并为不同太阳/行星际环境选择诊断谱线。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Feasibility is demonstrated with forward modeling of Mercury’s magnetosphere; otherwise specific datasets/instruments are not specified.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 可行性通过水星磁层的前向建模来展示；除外未明确给出具体数据集/仪器来源。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: It is relevant to space-physics and heliospheric magnetic-field imaging, potentially enabling remote mapping of weak magnetic structures beyond what spacecraft in-situ sampling provides, though it is not directly focused on Earth geophysics.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 它与空间物理/日—行星际磁场成像高度相关，可能使弱磁结构的远程成像成为可能，从而超越仅靠航天器原位采样的局限；但并非直接面向地球地球物理问题。

paper.title: FARSim: a fast RF-chain-aware trigger-screening surrogate for radio detection of ultra-high-energy cosmic rays
paper.abstract: Radio arrays provide a scalable route to detecting extensive air showers from ultra-high-energy cosmic rays, but trigger studies for candidate layouts are expensive when every energy, arrival direction, core position and trigger configuration is evaluated with full radio simulations. We present FARSim, a fast surrogate framework that reuses a reduced library of ZHAireS reference footprints to reconstruct ground-plane radio emission and to estimate trigger-relevant observables. The method combines vector geomagnetic and charge-excess field decomposition, geomagnetic-angle and energy scaling, geometrical projection, contour-based core sampling and event-rate integration. We validate the reconstructed field footprints and trigger regions against dedicated ZHAireS simulations, and quantify the computational gain obtained by replacing repeated full shower simulations with fast footprint queries. We further extend the peak-field surrogate to time-domain electric-field synthesis by combining the predicted three-component peak-field vector with geometry-dependent normalized pulse templates. Propagating these traces through an RF-chain response enables voltage-domain threshold and L1-trigger diagnostics. For the validation samples considered here, the time-domain extension reaches a median vector-waveform R^2 of 0.986 over 2112 hold-out ZHAireS traces when tested at the true peak amplitude. FARSim is therefore intended as a rapid, physics-informed screening layer for array-layout and trigger studies; absolute exposure predictions and detector commissioning remain the role of full end-to-end simulations.

analysis.one_sentence_en: FARSim is a fast radio-simulation surrogate that reconstructs ZHAireS-based radio footprints and time-domain voltages to quickly assess trigger thresholds for ultra-high-energy cosmic-ray radio array layouts.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: FARSim是一种快速无线电仿真替代框架，可利用ZHAireS参考足迹重建辐射场并合成电压波形，从而高效评估超高能宇宙线射电阵列的触发阈值。
summary_en: Problem: Full ZHAireS trigger studies over many energies, directions, core positions, and trigger configurations are computationally expensive.

Approach: FARSim reuses a reduced ZHAireS footprint library with geomagnetic/charge-excess decomposition, energy and geomagnetic-angle scaling, geometric projection, contour-based core sampling, and—optionally—time-domain pulse synthesis through RF-chain response.

Key result: The surrogate reproduces field footprints and trigger regions against dedicated ZHAireS simulations and, for a tested hold-out set, achieves very high median vector-waveform agreement when extending to time-domain synthesis.
summary_zh: 问题：在多个能量、到达方向、核心位置和触发配置下进行完整ZHAireS触发研究计算量巨大。
方法：FARSim通过重用简化的ZHAireS足迹库，结合磁场与电荷超时的分解、能量与地磁角缩放、几何投影、等值线式核心采样，并进一步利用与几何相关的归一化脉冲模板与RF链响应进行时间域合成。
关键结果：该替代模型在场足迹与触发区域上能与专门的ZHAireS仿真对齐，并在所评估的时间域扩展验证样本上获得很高的波形一致性指标。
analysis.contribution_en: A physics-informed, RF-chain-aware surrogate framework that accelerates trigger-screening for ultra-high-energy cosmic-ray radio arrays by replacing repeated full end-to-end radio shower simulations with footprint queries and optional time-domain voltage synthesis.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出一种物理约束且考虑RF链效应的替代框架，通过用足迹查询替代重复的完整端到端放电仿真，并可选择性进行时间域电压合成，从而显著加速超高能宇宙线射电阵列的触发筛选。
analysis.method_en: Use a reduced library of ZHAireS reference ground-plane radio footprints; reconstruct geomagnetic and charge-excess components via scaling with geomagnetic angle and energy, apply geometric projection, sample candidate core positions using footprint contours, integrate event rates over the trigger region, and (for time-domain) synthesize three-component electric-field traces using normalized pulse templates and pass them through an RF-chain response to enable voltage threshold and L1-trigger diagnostics.
analysis.method_zh: 使用简化的ZHAireS参考地面足迹库；通过地磁角与能量缩放重建地面辐射场的地磁分量与电荷超时分量，进行几何投影，用足迹等值线进行候选核心位置采样，计算触发区域内的事件率积分；并可在时间域中基于三分量峰值场与几何相关的归一化脉冲模板合成电场波形，再通过RF链响应将其转换为电压以评估电压阈值与L1触发。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Validation uses hold-out ZHAireS simulation traces (2112) for radio footprints and time-domain electric-field synthesis; the paper does not specify a real-world observational site or experimental dataset.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 验证使用一组ZHAireS仿真得到的保留测试迹线（2112条），用于场足迹与时间域电场合成；论文未说明具体的真实观测站点或实验数据集。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is only tangential to Earth-physics/geophysics tracking topics, but it is relevant to instrumentation and RF trigger simulation workflows used in high-energy radio detection.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与当前地球物理/地学追踪主题关联较弱；但它对高能射电探测中的仪器链路与RF触发评估仿真流程具有方法学参考价值。

paper.title: FARSim: a fast RF-chain-aware trigger-screening surrogate for radio detection of ultra-high-energy cosmic rays
paper.abstract: Radio arrays provide a scalable route to detecting extensive air showers from ultra-high-energy cosmic rays, but trigger studies for candidate layouts are expensive when every energy, arrival direction, core position and trigger configuration is evaluated with full radio simulations. We present FARSim, a fast surrogate framework that reuses a reduced library of ZHAireS reference footprints to reconstruct ground-plane radio emission and to estimate trigger-relevant observables. The method combines vector geomagnetic and charge-excess field decomposition, geomagnetic-angle and energy scaling, geometrical projection, contour-based core sampling and event-rate integration. We validate the reconstructed field footprints and trigger regions against dedicated ZHAireS simulations, and quantify the computational gain obtained by replacing repeated full shower simulations with fast footprint queries. We further extend the peak-field surrogate to time-domain electric-field synthesis by combining the predicted three-component peak-field vector with geometry-dependent normalized pulse templates. Propagating these traces through an RF-chain response enables voltage-domain threshold and L1-trigger diagnostics. For the validation samples considered here, the time-domain extension reaches a median vector-waveform R^2 of 0.986 over 2112 hold-out ZHAireS traces when tested at the true peak amplitude. FARSim is therefore intended as a rapid, physics-informed screening layer for array-layout and trigger studies; absolute exposure predictions and detector commissioning remain the role of full end-to-end simulations.

analysis.one_sentence_en: FARSim is a fast, RF-chain-aware surrogate that uses a reduced library of ZHAireS footprints to reconstruct radio signals and evaluate trigger-relevant observables for ultra-high-energy cosmic-ray arrays with large computational speedups.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: FARSim利用ZHAireS参考足迹的简化库快速重建超高能宇宙线射电信号，并结合RF链响应进行触发诊断，从而显著降低阵列布设与触发研究的计算成本。
summary_en: Problem: Full radio simulations are too expensive for scanning cosmic-ray event parameters and trigger configurations when designing radio detector arrays.

Approach: Build a physics-informed surrogate by reusing ZHAireS reference footprints, decomposing geomagnetic and charge-excess components, applying energy/angle scaling and geometry projection, sampling cores from field contours, integrating event rates, and extending to time-domain electric fields and RF-chain voltage thresholds.

Key result: The time-domain extension reproduces three-component vector waveforms with high accuracy (median R² 0.986 over 2112 hold-out ZHAireS traces), enabling rapid trigger-region and voltage-threshold diagnostics while avoiding repeated full shower simulations.
summary_zh: 问题：在无线电探测宇宙线阵列设计中，对能量、入射方向、着地点及触发配置的全参数扫描需要极高计算成本。
方法：通过重用ZHAireS参考足迹构建物理约束替代模型，分解地磁与电荷超额分量，使用能量/地磁角缩放与几何投影，基于场等值轮廓进行着地点采样，积分事件率，并进一步扩展到时域电场合成，再经RF链响应评估电压阈值与L1触发诊断。
关键结果：在所考虑的验证样本上，时域扩展对三分量矢量波形的重建精度很高（在2112条ZHAireS留出样本上中位R²为0.986），从而可快速进行触发区域与电压阈值诊断。
analysis.contribution_en: A fast, RF-chain-aware surrogate framework (FARSim) that reconstructs ground-plane radio emission and time-domain voltages from a reduced ZHAireS footprint library, providing a rapid physics-informed screening layer for array-layout and trigger studies.
analysis.contribution_zh: 提出了一个快速且考虑RF链效应的替代框架（FARSim），从简化的ZHAireS足迹库中重建地面射电辐射与时域电压，用作阵列布局与触发研究的快速物理约束筛选层。
analysis.method_en: Reuse a reduced ZHAireS reference footprint library to reconstruct ground-plane radio emission; decompose geomagnetic and charge-excess fields; apply geomagnetic-angle and energy scaling plus geometrical projection; sample cores via contour-based core selection; integrate event-rate relevant observables; extend from peak-field surrogates to time-domain three-component electric-field synthesis using geometry-dependent normalized pulse templates; propagate through an RF-chain response to compute voltage thresholds and L1-trigger diagnostics.
analysis.method_zh: 重用简化的ZHAireS参考足迹库重建地面射电辐射；分解地磁场与电荷超额场；进行地磁角与能量缩放并进行几何投影；用基于场等值轮廓的着地点采样；积分与触发相关的事件率观测量；将峰值场替代进一步扩展到三分量时域电场合成（结合几何相关的归一化脉冲模板）；再通过RF链响应计算电压阈值与L1触发诊断。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Validation against hold-out ZHAireS simulation traces (2112 waveforms) used to test peak-field and time-domain electric-field reconstruction; Not specified: any real observational dataset or geographical site.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 用ZHAireS仿真留出波形进行验证（2112条波形），用于测试峰值场与时域电场重建；未说明具体真实观测数据或地理站点/区域。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This is tangential to geophysics: it targets radio detection of ultra-high-energy cosmic rays rather than Earth-structure or seismic/geophysical processes, but it is relevant to RF-chain-aware signal modeling and large-scale trigger studies in radio transient detection.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 与地球物理关联较弱：研究对象是超高能宇宙线的射电探测而非地球结构或地震等地球物理过程，但在RF链感知的信号建模与大规模触发筛选方面具有方法学参考价值。

paper.title: Toward reliable and high-resolution resistivity imaging with Controlled Source EM in land -densifying arrays as a key for success -10 years of progress for geothermal and mineral resources exploration
paper.abstract: The Controlled Source Electromagnetic (CSEM) method aims to image electrical resistivity at intermediate depths (0-3 km) for geothermal, mineral, and groundwater exploration. It was developed both as a deeper extension of DC resistivity (ERT) and as an active alternative to magnetotellurics (MT), capable of overcoming MT's limitations in challenging environments (noisy areas or weak natural signals). As demonstrated in marine settings, CSEM can provide high resolution and complementary illumination compared to MT. However, due to the significant logistical effort required for land deployment, most land-based CSEM surveys have used only a few transmitter positions (often one or two), effectively resembling CSAMT configurations. This limited source coverage results in poor resolution and unreliable resistivity models, where the acquisition footprint can be difficult to distinguish from actual geology. In this work, we review ten years of progress in land CSEM and demonstrate that dense arrays-with dozens to hundreds of synchronized sources and receivers-are key to achieving the high-resolution imaging originally expected. Despite greater logistical demands, we show that such surveys can be conducted with reasonable effort and cost, making them accessible for both industrial and academic applications. Furthermore, CSEM can be combined with MT at minimal additional cost, improving model constraints and reducing exploration risk.

analysis.one_sentence_en: This review argues that land controlled-source EM becomes reliable and high-resolution when deployed as dense, synchronized multi-transmitter and multi-receiver arrays rather than sparse single- or dual-transmitter layouts, and that joint CSEM/MT further improves constraints.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 该综述指出，陆地受控源电磁法要获得可靠且高分辨率的电阻率成像，关键在于使用密集同步的多发射源与多接收器阵列，而非稀疏单/双发射源布设，并且联合CSEM/MT可进一步增强约束并降低勘探风险。
summary_en: Problem: Land CSEM surveys often use only one or two transmitter positions, leading to poor illumination balance, spatial aliasing, and unreliable resistivity models whose footprints can be mistaken for geology.

Approach: The authors review a decade of land CSEM progress and synthesize evidence from modeling and field examples, emphasizing dense arrays with dozens to hundreds of synchronized sources and receivers and proposing low-cost joint CSEM/MT acquisition.

Key result: They demonstrate that densifying to achieve balanced multi-source/multi-receiver coverage enables the high-resolution imaging expected for intermediate depths and can be implemented with reasonable effort, cost, and improved constraints when combined with MT.
summary_zh: 问题：陆地CSEM往往只布设一到两个发射位置，导致照明不均衡、空间混叠以及电阻率反演不可靠，甚至使测量阵列足迹难以与真实地质区分。
方法：作者回顾近十年陆地CSEM进展，并结合数值模拟与野外案例，强调使用几十到上百个同步的发射源与接收器构成密集阵列，同时提出以低额外成本联合CSEM/MT采集来提升约束。
关键结果：他们表明将源接收覆盖密度提高到多源—多接收均衡后，可实现原本期望的中等深度高分辨率成像；该策略在现实工作量与成本下可行，并且与MT联合可进一步改善模型约束。
analysis.contribution_en: Provides a decade-spanning synthesis showing that dense, synchronized multi-transmitter/multi-receiver arrays are the decisive design factor for achieving dependable high-resolution land CSEM resistivity imaging, and that joint CSEM/MT can be integrated with minimal extra cost to reduce exploration risk.
analysis.contribution_zh: 总结并论证：陆地CSEM实现可靠、具有高分辨率的电阻率成像，关键设计要素是密集同步的多发射源—多接收器阵列；同时指出联合CSEM/MT可在极低额外成本下提升约束、降低勘探风险。
analysis.method_en: A controlled-source EM workflow for land surveys that uses dense synchronized transmitter and receiver arrays (multi-TX/multi-RX) for intermediate-depth resistivity inversion, with optional joint acquisition and inversion constraints from magnetotellurics.
analysis.method_zh: 陆地受控源电磁的工作流程：通过密集同步的多发射源与多接收器阵列（多TX/多RX）进行中等深度电阻率反演，并可选择与大地电磁（MT）联合采集以增强约束。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Intermediate-depth (0–3 km) land CSEM use cases including examples such as the Kuusamo dataset (Finland) within the UNDERCOVER project; additional references include synthetic studies and other historical/recent field cases.
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 研究对象为陆地中等深度（0–3 km）CSEM应用场景；文中给出如芬兰KUUSAMO地区在UNDERCOVER项目中的数据示例，并结合合成模型以及既有与近期野外案例进行说明。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: This directly supports the tracked topic of reliable high-resolution resistivity imaging for geothermal/mineral exploration, because it identifies practical array-design requirements (dense multi-TX/multi-RX) and motivates joint CSEM/MT to overcome challenging-noise or weak-signal environments.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 这与当前追踪的可靠高分辨率电阻率成像主题高度相关：文章明确提出实现成功成像所需的可操作阵列设计（密集多TX/多RX），并强调联合CSEM/MT有助于在噪声大或天然信号弱的环境中克服MT局限。

paper.title: Lattice-Trapped Atom Interferometry with a Bose-Einstein condensate: Observation and Control of Interactions
paper.abstract: Precision interferometry with atomic wavepackets confined in a one-dimensional optical lattice is an emergent paradigm in quantum sensing of forces and fields, with applications in gravimetry, accelerometry, geophysics, and fundamental physics tests. We report on the realization of a lattice-trapped interferometer where the two arms are sourced from a weakly-interacting ytterbium Bose-Einstein condensate, coherently split and trapped by pulsed optical standing waves before recombination. We directly observe atomic interactions through contrast changes and phase shifts of the interferometer. By changing either the atom number or the sample volume to vary the density, we demonstrate control over interactions and optimize interferometer performance. Our observations are effectively captured by a mean-field theoretical model of the system. This work experimentally probes the boundary where improved performance from source brightening through higher phase space density transitions into a regime beyond single-atom physics in lattice-trapped atom interferometry, and opens a door to incorporating many-body effects for metrological advances in such platforms.

analysis.one_sentence_en: They realize a one-dimensional lattice-trapped atom interferometer using a ytterbium BEC as the coherent source, directly observing and controlling mean-field interaction effects via contrast and phase shifts as density is tuned.
analysis.one_sentence_zh: 他们用镱原子BEC实现一维光晶格俘获的原子干涉仪，随密度调节直接观测并控制相互作用引起的对比度与相位变化。
summary_en: Problem: Interaction-driven dephasing and phase shifts limit contrast and metrological performance in lattice-trapped atom interferometry as density increases.

Approach: Use a lattice-trapped interferometer with BEC splitting/holding/recombination, tune interaction strength by varying BEC expansion time, atom number, sample volume, and arm imbalance, and compare measured contrast/phase to a mean-field model.

key result: Interaction effects are directly observed as contrast decay and interaction-induced global phase shifts, and they show controllable optimization of interferometer performance with mean-field theory matching the measurements.
summary_zh: 问题：在晶格俘获原子干涉仪中，相互作用引起的退相干和相位偏移会随密度升高而限制对比度与测量性能。
方法：构建BEC源的晶格俘获干涉仪，通过改变BEC膨胀时间、原子数、样品体积与臂间不平衡来调节相互作用强度，测量对比度与相位并与均场模型对比。
关键结果：相互作用效应以对比度衰减与相互作用导致的整体相位偏移被直接观测，并且通过实验控制实现干涉仪性能优化，且均场理论与实验吻合。
analysis.contribution_en: Experimental demonstration of a lattice-trapped atom interferometer with a BEC source that enables direct observation and controlled management of interaction-induced dephasing and global phase shifts, validated by an effective mean-field description and used to map the transition beyond single-atom physics for metrology.
analysis.contribution_zh: 实验实现了以BEC为源的晶格俘获原子干涉仪，使得相互作用诱导的退相干与整体相位偏移能够被直接观测并可控调节，并以均场框架得到验证，从而为多体效应驱动的计量改进提供基准。
analysis.method_en: Vertical sequence where a 174Yb BEC is expanded, velocity-selected, coherently split by pulsed standing-wave beams into two lattice-separated arms, held for a tunable time in a one-dimensional optical lattice under Bloch-oscillation timing, then recombined; contrast and phase are extracted from atom-number asymmetry fringes as density is tuned by expansion time, atom number, sample volume, and deliberate arm imbalance, compared to a mean-field (Gross-Pitaevskii/ensemble-averaged) theoretical model.
analysis.method_zh: 采用竖直方向的序列：先释放并膨胀174Yb的BEC，做速度选择，再用脉冲驻波将波包相干分裂成两条在一维光晶格中空间分离的臂，随后在布洛赫振荡调控的条件下进行可变保持时间的俘获，并在释放后再相干重组；通过空间分辨的臂输出原子数不对称扫描相位得到对比度与相位，并用改变膨胀时间、原子数、样品体积与人为臂间不平衡来调节密度，同时与均场（Gross-Pitaevskii/均场平均）理论模型对比。
analysis.data_or_region_en: Laboratory cold-atom experiment with a 1D optical lattice and 174Yb BEC source; no geographic region or external dataset is involved (Not specified).
analysis.data_or_region_zh: 实验室冷原子装置：一维光晶格中的174Yb BEC源；不涉及地理区域或外部数据集（未说明）。
analysis.geophysics_relevance_en: Relevance is tangential: while the platform targets general quantum sensing applications including geophysics (via gravimetry/acceleration measurements), the paper primarily focuses on interaction physics and control within the interferometer rather than direct geophysical field retrieval.
analysis.geophysics_relevance_zh: 相关性较弱：该平台面向包括地球物理在内的量子传感应用（如重力/加速度测量），但论文重点是干涉仪内部的相互作用效应观测与控制，而非直接进行地球物理反演。

paper.title: Forecasting Lives Lost to Climate Change
paper.abstract: This review synthesises empirical evidence linking global mean surface temperature to climate mortality through undernourishment, heat, extreme events, conflict, and disease, and introduces an exploratory precautionary metric: cumulative climate-related deaths per cumulative megatonne of greenhouse gas emissions (CO₂-e), intended to support policy evaluation under deep uncertainty.
